inputs.description: JDK8_HOME (recomendado; para compilar com -source/-target 1.7). Pode ficar vazio se você usar o profile -Ptoolchain com ~/.m2/toolchains.xml

tasks.label: DevDrops: Build WAR (Java 8 / target 1.7)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; . '${workspaceFolder}\scripts\load-dotenv.ps1'; $jdk8='${input:jdk8Home}'; if ($env:JDK8_HOME) { $jdk8=$env:JDK8_HOME }; if ($jdk8) { $javac=Join-Path $jdk8 'bin\javac.exe'; if (!(Test-Path $javac)) { throw ('JDK8_HOME inválido (javac.exe não encontrado): ' + $javac) }; $env:JAVA_HOME=$jdk8; $env:Path="$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:Path" }; mvn -U clean package

tasks.label: DevDrops: Deploy WAR to JBoss
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; . '${workspaceFolder}\scripts\load-dotenv.ps1'; $jboss='${input:jbossHome}'; if ($env:JBOSS_HOME) { $jboss=$env:JBOSS_HOME }; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($jboss)) { throw 'JBOSS_HOME missing (set in .env or via task input)' }; $war='${workspaceFolder}\target\devdrops.war'; $dest=Join-Path $jboss 'server\default\deploy\devdrops.war'; if (!(Test-Path $war)) { throw 'WAR not found. Run build first.' }; Copy-Item -Force $war $dest; Write-Host ('Deployed to: ' + $dest)

tasks.label: DevDrops: Tail JBoss server.log
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; . '${workspaceFolder}\scripts\load-dotenv.ps1'; $jboss='${input:jbossHome}'; if ($env:JBOSS_HOME) { $jboss=$env:JBOSS_HOME }; $log=Join-Path $jboss 'server\default\log\server.log'; if (!(Test-Path $log)) { throw ('Log not found: ' + $log) }; Get-Content -Path $log -Wait -Tail 200

tasks.label: DevDrops: Requirements check (no JPA2 / Java8 syntax)
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $root='${workspaceFolder}'; $javaHits=Select-String -Path (Join-Path $root 'src\main\java\**\*.java') -Pattern 'TypedQuery|createQuery\(\s*"[^"]+"\s*,|java\.util\.stream' -AllMatches -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $xhtmlHits=Select-String -Path (Join-Path $root 'src\main\webapp\**\*.xhtml') -Pattern '<\s*h:head\b|<\s*h:body\b' -AllMatches -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($javaHits -or $xhtmlHits) { if($javaHits){ $javaHits | ForEach-Object { $_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ' ' + $_.Line.Trim() } }; if($xhtmlHits){ $xhtmlHits | ForEach-Object { $_.Path + ':' + $_.LineNumber + ' ' + $_.Line.Trim() } }; exit 1 } else { Write-Host 'OK: sem JPA 2.0 TypedQuery/createQuery(String,Class), sem Streams, e sem <h:head>/<h:body> (JSF 2.x) nas views.' }
